message:
refactor(abi): migrate static host FFI externs to runtime dlsym resolution for network/tty/fstab functions

- Replace compile-time extern "C" declarations for fstab, ttyent, netent,
  servent, hostent, protoent, and netgrent families with runtime
  host_resolve::resolve_host_symbol_raw() lookups via dlsym
- Remove now-unused NetEnt, Fstab, and TtyEnt struct definitions that were
  only needed for the static extern bindings
- Rewrite gethostbyname2 to use thread-local storage with gethostbyname2_r
  for thread safety instead of delegating to the non-reentrant gethostbyname
- Update setnetgrent to delegate to host libc so missing-group behavior
  matches glibc semantics instead of always returning success
- Update ABI tests to match the new runtime-resolved function signatures

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
